title: 2Pcs 137*274cm White and Gold Disposable TableCloths Party Paper Plastic TableCloth,Gold Star Rectangular Waterproof Table Cover for Picnic,Baby Shower,Wedding,Christmas,Birthday Party Decorations
features: Material: tablecloth is made of PVEA100%, Biodegradable, environmentally-friendly, non-toxic and harmless to human body.The plastic material can be recycled, which minimizes their carbon footprint.
Size: Each tablecloth is about 137 x 274 CM, fit most rectangular tables of different sizes.
Reuse or Dispose:After the party, simply rinse and wipe off the plastic table covers for reuse in the next party or roll them up and dispose them off.
Different Colors: Let your imagination run wild! These tablecloths come in a wide range of colors and styles to suit your particular mood so you can accommodate different party themes!

Wide Used: These plastic disposable tablecloths are great for parties, weddings, catering, thanksgiving, Christmas, Baby Showers, BBQ cookouts, Outdoor events, catering, holiday décor, restaurant, home use, and any other event.
description: Product description Material: Plastic Tablecloth made of non toxic,chlorine free,no chemical odor,BPA free PEVA Size: Each tablecloth is about 54 Inch x 108 Inch(137 x 274 CM) [Disposable - Used as a Large Garbage Bag]: PEVA material makes the disposable table covers have good tear resistance and good load-bearing capacity. You can use the table blankets as a large garbage bag to clean up all the messy things on the table after the party. [Reusable - How to do]: The PEVA table cloths protector are primarily used as disposable items,but it also can be reused if you use the table coverings with care. Any stain on the table overlays can be wiped off with a cleaning cloth and rinsed it up with water before drying. Safety Warning Attention: Keep the tablecloth away from heat sources. Hand wash only.
